headline: ThoughtSpot Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Analytics and BI Platforms
summary: Recognition Acknowledges ThoughtSpot’s Vision for Agentic Analytics, Trusted AI, and Enterprise Intelligence at ScaleMOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., July 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ThoughtSpot, the Agentic Analytics Platform company, today announced that Gartner, Inc. has positioned the company in the Leaders Quadrant of the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Analytics and BI Platforms. headline: Tenable Named as the Current Company to Beat for AI-Powered Exposure Assessment in a June 2026 Gartner® Report
summary: COLUMBIA, Md., July 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tenable® Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TENB), the exposure management company, today announced that Gartner has identified Tenable as the company to beat for AI-powered exposure assessment in its report, AI Vendor Race: Tenable Is the Company to Beat for AI-Powered Exposure Assessment.
